title: The benefits of understanding Grafana Cloud billing and usage

blocks.content: Understanding your Grafana Cloud billing and usage is essential for maintaining control over your observability costs while maximizing the value of your investment. Cost transparency helps teams make informed decisions about their monitoring strategy and prevents unexpected charges.

The Cost Management and Billing app centralizes this information in one place. With clear visibility into your billing patterns, you can:

- **Optimize spending**: Identify high-cost products and take action to reduce unnecessary usage.
- **Budget effectively**: Plan and allocate resources based on actual usage patterns.
- **Attribute costs**: Understand which teams, applications, or services drive your observability expenses.
- **Prevent overages**: Set up proactive alerts to avoid unexpected billing spikes.
- **Scale confidently**: Make data-driven decisions about expanding your observability coverage.
In the next milestone, you'll open the Cost Management and Billing app, where you can access all of your billing and usage information in one place.
